block_02: Please be advised that as per the Company's T&C, the Company conducts regular account reviews to ensure compliance with its regulatory obligations.
block_03: Therefore, we kindly ask you to provide supporting documents clarifying the source of funds you deposited to your IQOption trading account.
block_04: For your convenience, you may find a (non-exhaustive) list of relevant documents to verify the source of funds:
block_06: Bank statement showing income/balance/transactions to your trading account;
block_07: Credit card statement displaying credit amount/transactions to your trading account;
block_08: Trading account(s) balance and/or history from other brokers;
block_11: Tax return from tax authorities showing declared income;
block_16: You may provide at least one relevant to your financial situation.
block_17: Lastly, we kindly ask you to verify the payment method used to deposit in your account (e.g., copy of both sides of the credit/debit/prepaid card or screenshot of your e-wallet).
block_18: We would like to emphasize that failure to respond to
block_20: within a time-frame of twenty (20) days may result in partial suspension of your trading account.
block_21: We appreciate your cooperation in this matter.
